positive: A stylized, symmetrical arrangement of whimsical forest creatures and geometric floral elements, forming a cohesive mandala pattern. Main subjects include a friendly, stylized fox, a pair of majestic owls perched on branches, and intricate, glowing moonflowers. The style is neo-art nouveau meets graphic minimalism, utilizing thick, continuous line work and strong silhouette contrast. Composition should be centered, repeatable, and suitable for large-scale fabric printing. Color palette: Deep sapphire blue, emerald green, dusty gold, and creamy ivory accents. Lighting should be soft, ethereal, and highly diffused, enhancing the glow effects. Clean vector aesthetic, high saturation, perfect symmetry, crisp outlines.
negative: blurry, low contrast, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, asymmetrical, photographic, depth of field, gradient noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs
